---
title: ""
---

::: columns

::: {.column width="50%" style="text-align: center;"}

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.align='center', out.width='80%'}
knitr::include_graphics("images/Samridhi_Headshot.jpeg")
```

## Samridhi Purohit

:::

::: {.column width="50%" style="text-align: left;"}

Hi, welcome to my website. I am an MPH candidate in Global Health at Emory University’s Rollins School of Public Health, with interests in global health, health equity, humanitarian emergencies, and applied public health data science.

My work focuses on using data, communication, and public health programming to better understand health needs and support more effective decision-making.

:::

:::
